text: Here, in this stark, artificially-lit hallway and dim space marked 'R+D,' I feel an unsettling stillness. Shadows and silence press in, making the ordinary seem uncanny. Emptiness lingers like a question, urging introspection about the boundary between creation and desolation. I am both present and adrift, wondering what purpose persists in abandoned, quiet places. A peculiar loneliness envelops me, and with it, a sharpened awareness of space, light, and my own contemplative solitude.
